testCaseName: N-Of query requesting 2 of 3 mutations with details action where 2 fields are selected
query: default.filter(nOf(2, {nucleotideEquals(position:=1, symbol:='-', sequenceName:='main'), nucleotideEquals(position:=2, symbol:='T', sequenceName:='main'), nucleotideEquals(position:=27542, symbol:='N', sequenceName:='main')})).project({age, pango_lineage}).orderBy({age, pango_lineage})
